value.found_quote: Anthropic's Claude models are available through Vertex AI. ... Claude is also available through Amazon Bedrock, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry.
value.rationale: The page explicitly states that Claude models are available on Google Cloud's Vertex AI (a third-party platform), and also mentions availability on Amazon Bedrock, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry. This directly substantiates the claim that Anthropic offers Claude on third-party platforms. The offering appears to be generally available (active), with detailed API documentation, model IDs, SDK support, and feature lists provided.
